title: Step 4: Click .
description:
Self-managed X.509 certificates, also known as mutual TLS or mTLS,
provide database users access to the clusters in your
project. Database users are separate from Atlas users. Database
users have access to MongoDB databases, while Atlas users have
access to the Atlas application itself.

headings.text: Configure a Project to use a Public Key Infrastructure
View or Modify Self-Managed X.509 Authentication Settings
Add a Database User using Self-Managed X.509 Authentication
